examples: I checked the list again and everything is done.
Thank you for everything you've done for us.
A: What do you want to do at the amusement park?B: Everything!
I did everything today – washed the dishes, cut the lawn, did the laundry.

definitions.text: A state of well-being (from all parts of the whole).
examples: She wasn't feeling well this morning but now everything is fine.

definitions.text: Used as a placeholder verb to encapsulate a set of related verbs or any action. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
